<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/webhook/addresses/{webhookId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve all addresses associated with a specific webhook.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

>
